channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Greens Approve Labor’s Superannuation Tax Measures Ahead of May Budget
item.description: The Greens have signalled their support for the Albanese government’s upcoming May budget, particularly for legislation targeting superannuation balances exceeding $3 million. After months of negotiat...

item.title: Exploring Happiness Beyond Money and Pleasure
item.description: This article explores the concept of happiness and the many ways it is defined and pursued in today's world. The author draws on philosophical and scientific perspectives, including his own research i...

item.title: Pakistan Navy initiates Operation Muhafizul Bahr for securing national shipping amid regional maritime threats
item.description: The Pakistan Navy has officially launched Operation Muhafizul Bahr, as announced by the Inter-Services Public Relations (ISPR) on March 9, 2026. This operation aims to tackle multidimensional threats ...

item.title: Ogoni Mangrove Wetlands in Ogoniland Officially Designated as Ramsar Site of International Importance by HYPREP Announcement
item.description: The Hydrocarbon Pollution Remediation Project (HYPREP) don announce say the mangrove wetlands for Ogoniland don finally become Ramsar Site of International Importance under the Ramsar Convention on We...

item.title: ISWAP Shares Video Claiming Coordinated Attacks on Nigerian Army Positions in Borno, With Reported Heavy Casualties and Equipment Seizures
item.description: Terrorists from the Islamic State West Africa Province (ISWAP) don release one long video wey show their coordinated attacks on four Nigerian Army bases inside Borno State on March 5, 2026. The attack...

item.title: Mojtaba Khamenei named Iran’s supreme leader amid ongoing Middle East conflict
item.description: Iran has officially named Mojtaba Khamenei as the successor to his late father, Ali Khamenei, marking the continuation of hardline leadership. The announcement signals that there is little prospect fo...

item.title: Authorities arrest two shabu dealers in Lanao del Sur, seize P20.7 million worth of drugs
item.description: COTABATO CITY — Police authorities successfully apprehended two shabu dealers during a planned entrapment operation in Barangay Maladig, Picong, Lanao del Sur on March 9, 2026. The suspects, Ben Paidu...

item.title: Serengeti Breweries strengthens partnerships with government to support local farmers and agriculture
item.description: Dar es Salaam: Serengeti Breweries Limited (SBL) recently held a strategic meeting with the Minister for Agriculture, Hon. Daniel Chongolo, to discuss ways to boost local agricultural value chains and...

item.title: Analysis of Short Selling Trends and Key Positions on the TSX
item.description: This report examines the current landscape of short selling on the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX). Short selling involves borrowing and selling shares with the expectation of repurchasing them at a lowe...

item.title: Punjab Announces School Closures and Austerity Measures Due to Fuel Shortage from Middle East Conflict
item.description: The Punjab government, under Chief Minister Maryam Nawaz, has introduced strict measures to tackle the economic fallout from a global oil crisis triggered by the Middle East conflict, particularly dis...

item.title: Jaishankar Explains India's Permission for Iranian Ships to Dock in Indian Ports
item.description: External Affairs Minister S. Jaishankar informed Parliament that India permitted three Iranian vessels to dock at its ports following a formal request from Iran. The request, made on 28th February, wa...

item.title: South Africa Pushes Local Production of Anti-HIV Jab to End AIDS by 2043
item.description: South Africa’s National Aids Council (SANAC) has called on local pharmaceutical companies to submit applications by 7 April to produce generic versions of lenacapavir, a twice-yearly anti-HIV injectio...

item.title: Victoria’s high survival rate for cardiac arrests thanks to bystander CPR and AEDs
item.description: In Victoria, bystander response to cardiac arrests is saving lives at record rates. Marita Hook, 61, collapsed from a cardiac arrest in a Cheltenham pub, but thanks to her friends' immediate CPR and u...

item.title: BJP Confirms Seat-Sharing with Regional Allies Ahead of Assam Assembly Polls
item.description: The Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) has confirmed its seat-sharing arrangement with two of its three regional allies ahead of the upcoming Assam Assembly elections, Chief Minister Himanta Biswa Sarma ann...

item.title: Canadian lawyers debate banning NDAs in sexual harassment cases amid ethical concerns
item.description: Ashley Chand, a former director of administration at Vancouver’s Murphy Battista law firm, alleges sexual harassment by a senior lawyer at the firm’s 2023 Christmas party. Chand reported the incident ...

item.title: Mtwara District Commissioner calls for traders’ cooperation in TRA tax education campaign
item.description: The Mtwara District Commissioner, Abdallah Mwaipaya, has made a public appeal for traders to fully cooperate with the Tanzania Revenue Authority (TRA) during their ongoing tax education campaign. On M...

item.title: Amboseli Main Airstrip Temporarily Closed After Heavy Rains
item.description: The Kenya Wildlife Service (KWS) has temporarily stopped flights at the main Amboseli airstrip after heavy rains flooded the area, making it unsafe for planes. The closure affects airlines, tour opera...

item.title: PAGASA Confirms La Niña Has Ended
item.description: The Philippine Atmospheric, Geophysical and Astronomical Services Administration (PAGASA) has officially announced the conclusion of the La Niña weather phenomenon in the country. La Niña, which is ch...

item.title: SAPS tender under investigation as Suleiman Carrim testifies about dealings with Vusimuzi Matlala
item.description: North West businessman Suleiman Carrim testified at the Madlanga Commission of Inquiry regarding his financial involvement with alleged crime figure Vusimuzi 'Cat' Matlala. The hearing began with tens...

item.title: Mother campaigns for tougher sentences after driver who killed her teenage daughter on zebra crossing is released early
item.description: Sian Morgan, the mother of 15-year-old Keely Morgan, has expressed profound disbelief and anger after the driver responsible for her daughter's death was released from prison after serving only six-an...
